topics.title: How to install OceanBase on Kubernetes (minimal prod checklist)?
topics.excerpt: Looking for a hardened single-replica dev setup vs. 3-node obcluster for staging.
topics.author: platform_eng
topics.body: Looking for a hardened single-replica dev setup vs. 3-node obcluster for staging. Any Helm values or operator tips?

replies.author: harry_z
replies.body: Start with the official ob-operator quickstart; for staging use 3 observers + 1 OBProxy. Happy to share our values.yaml stripped of secrets.

topics.title: MySQL to OceanBase migration: OMS vs manual dump — what worked for you?
topics.excerpt: 500GB OLTP schema, need near-zero downtime. Comparing OceanBase Migration Service vs logical export.
topics.author: migrator_cn
topics.body: We are moving a 500GB MySQL 8 OLTP workload to OceanBase. Ops team prefers OMS; devs want mysqldump + load for control. Experiences?

replies.author: oug_mod
replies.body: OMS for production cutover with incremental sync; manual dump fine for dev/staging. Check charset and sql_mode mapping first.

topics.title: HTAP: analytical queries slowing OLTP on same tenant — tuning tips?
topics.excerpt: Column store kicks in but p99 OLTP latency spikes during heavy AP jobs.
topics.author: dba_apac
topics.body: Running mixed OLTP + reporting on one OceanBase tenant. When AP scans run, OLTP p99 jumps. Resource isolation settings?

topics.title: seekdb hybrid search returns empty — knn + BM25 in one SQL
topics.excerpt: Vector leg works alone but combined knn + BM25 query returns 0 rows.
topics.author: alex_dev
topics.body: Running hybrid search on a 50k doc table. Vector leg alone returns results; combined query returns 0 rows. seekdb 1.2 · FTS index status BUILDING?

replies.author: oug_mod
replies.body: Check FTS index finished building (SHOW INDEX) and lower k for a smoke test.

topics.title: PowerMem tier configuration for long-running agents
topics.excerpt: How to set decay and retrieval weights when sessions span days?
topics.author: agent_builder
topics.body: Integrating PowerMem with an OpenClaw-style agent. Sessions run for days — default decay seems too aggressive. Recommended tier setup?

topics.title: Vector index build fails after upgrade to 4.3
topics.excerpt: IVF index rebuild stalls at 78%; logs show memory limit on observer node.
topics.author: dba_sea
topics.body: IVF index rebuild stalls at 78%; observer logs show memory limit. 32GB RAM, 4c.

topics.title: MySQL compatibility: GROUP BY behavior difference after migration
topics.excerpt: ONLY_FULL_GROUP_BY queries failing on OceanBase with different error text.
topics.author: migrator
topics.body: Porting from MySQL 8 — queries with ONLY_FULL_GROUP_BY fail on OceanBase. Anyone mapped the gaps?

replies.author: oug_mod
replies.body: See docs on sql_mode parity; edge cases tracked in 4.3.1 release notes.

topics.title: OBProxy connection pool sizing for Java microservices
topics.excerpt: Too many idle connections after scale-out; looking for pool + timeout guidance.
topics.author: java_ops
topics.body: Spring Boot services behind OBProxy — connection count grows after pod scale. Best practices for max connections and idle timeout?

topics.title: Backup and restore SLA: logical vs physical backup for 2TB tenant
topics.excerpt: RPO 15 min target; evaluating incremental backup schedule.
topics.author: sre_team
topics.body: 2TB tenant, need RPO ~15 minutes. Physical backup nightly + log archive — does this match your production setup?

replies.author: oug_mod
replies.body: Most teams combine periodic full backup with continuous clog archive; test restore quarterly.

topics.title: seekdb embedded mode in Python — first hybrid query example?
topics.excerpt: pip install works; looking for minimal RAG retrieval SQL sample.
topics.author: ml_eng
topics.body: Got seekdb running embedded in Python. Need a minimal example: insert docs, run vector + keyword hybrid search in one SQL.
